\tzpentry{ID4248}{Tunnel Quantum Pressure Scaling Law}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4248 introduces Tunnel Quantum Pressure Scaling Law as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$ P_{tunnel} \propto\exp\left(-\frac{2}{\hbar}\int_{d_{min}}^{d_{bolt}} \sqrt{2 m_{eff}U_{barrier}(d’)}\,dd’\right) $$
